query_normalized: quantifying the influence of initial conditions on chaotic systems physics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it investigates the dynamics of chaotic systems (Hamiltonian dynamics, point vortices) and characterizes their transport properties, which are fundamentally determined by the system's initial conditions and evolution. It provides canonical evidence on the behavior of chaotic flows, a core component of the user's query regarding the influence of initial conditions on such systems.
